figures.caption: Table 2: LOO Macro-F1 across all models and input configurations. Classical ML, tabular foundation models (TFMs), gradient boosting, and LLM zeroshot baselines. Best per language in bold. † = zero-shot (no training data).
Table 3: Few-shot Macro-F1 (embeddings-only, k shots/class, 3 seeds) vs. LLM zero-shot reference. Best overall per language in bold.
